Black Brutdrago._current:
1 Tuner + 1 or more non-Tuner Gemini monsters
① OPT | You can send 1 Gemini monster from your hand to the GY to select and DESTROY 1 Spell or Trap Card your opponent controls.
② When this card is destroyed and sent to the GY, you can select 1 Gemini monster in your GY and Special Summon it.
The Special Summoned Gemini monster is treated as an Effect Monster, and gains its effect.

Crimson Blader/Assault Mode._current: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned with "Assault Mode Activate". ① Your opponent cannot activate the effects of Level 5 or higher monsters Special Summoned from the Extra Deck. ② HOPT | You can reveal this card in your hand; SEARCH 1 "Assault Mode Activate" or 1 card that mentions it and if you do, shuffle this card into the Deck. ③ If this card is destroyed: You can Special Summon 1 "Crimson Blader" from your GY.

Dragunity Lord - Georgius._current: 2+ monsters, including a Tuner While this card is equipped with a "Dragunity" card, your opponent cannot activate the effects of monsters in the GY. You can only use each of the following effects of "Dragunity Lord - Georgius" once per turn. If this card is Link Summoned, or your opponent Special Summons a monster(s): You can Special Summon 1 Level 5 or higher "Dragunity" monster from your Extra Deck or GY. When your opponent activates a Spell/Trap Card or effect (QUICK EFFECT): You can send 1 Equip Card you control to the GY; NEGATE that effect.

Exstellarknight Constellar Ptolemy Ω7._current: 3 Level 7 monsters Once per turn, during your Main Phase 2, you can also Xyz Summon "Exstellarknight Constellar Ptolemy Ω7" by using 1 "tellarknight" or "Constellar" Xyz Monster you control (transfer its materials). While you have 7 or more "tellarknight" monsters with different names in your GY and/or BANISHment, this card gains 2700 ATK/DEF, also it is unaffected by your opponent's activated effects. Once per turn (QUICK EFFECT): You can detach any number of materials from this card, then target that many monsters your opponent controls; shuffle them into the Deck.

Gouki The Tyrant Ogre._current: 1 "Gouki" Link Monster + 1 Warrior, Dinosaur, or Cyberse monster ① If this card battles, your opponent cannot activate cards or effects until the end of the Damage Step. ② HOPT | If this card is Fusion Summoned: You can target cards on the field up to the total Link Rating of "Gouki" monsters used as this card's material (if you used a Link-3 or higher monster, neither player can activate those targeted cards or their effects in response to this effect's activation); DESTROY them.

Jupiter the Power Patron of Destruction._current: 3 Level 10 monsters Once per turn, you can also Xyz Summon "Jupiter the Power Patron of Destruction" by using 1 monster you control equipped with 3 or more Equip Cards (transfer its materials). ① If this card is Xyz Summoned: You can equip any number of Equip Spells from your GY to this card that can equip to it. ② Gains 3000 ATK while it has an Xyz Monster as material. ③ OPT | You can detach 1 material from this card; Special Summon 1 "DoomZ" monster from your GY, then you can DESTROY 1 card on the field.

Medium Piece Golem._current:
When this card is Summoned, if you control a "Big Piece Golem", you can Special Summon 1 "Small Piece Golem" from your Deck.
That monster's effect is negated while it is face-up on the field.

Multiple Piece Golem._current:
"Big Piece Golem" + "Medium Piece Golem"
① At the end of the Battle Phase, if this card attacked or was attacked, you can return it to the Extra Deck.

Reeshaddoll Wendikuruhu._current: 1 "Shaddoll" monster + 1 WIND monster Must first be Fusion Summoned.
